title: UniBee
description: Open-source, gateway-agnostic subscription billing and invoicing platform for SaaS businesses.
installation: Primary web/API container only (unibee/api). DATABASE_LINK uses a MySQL DSN, so this template wires the mariadb add-on (UniBee speaks MySQL, not postgres). The valkey add-on has no password, so REDIS_PASSWORD is left empty. UniBee is a multi-container stack: also deploy the companion services as separate Kubero apps and route them behind one ingress (UniBee normally fronts them with nginx): admin merchant portal = unibee/admin-portal:v1.9.0 (port 80), user portal = unibee/user-portal:v1.9.0 (port 80), and the licensing service = unibee/license-api:v1.0.2-premium (port 80). Set UNIBEE_API_URL and the portal URLs to your public host once routing is set up; replace UNIBEE_LICENSE with your key (blank works in stand-alone MODE for the open-source edition). Rotate the mariadb password from the slug default. First run: open the admin portal and create the first merchant/admin account.
